manifesto.title: 7th Pay Commission & DA Arrears
manifesto.desc: Implement 7th Pay Commission for state employees and clear all pending DA arrears.

manifesto.title: Annapurna Scheme — ₹3,000/month for Women
manifesto.desc: Monthly ₹3,000 financial assistance to all eligible women under Annapurna Scheme.

manifesto.title: Uniform Civil Code (UCC)
manifesto.desc: Draft and pass Uniform Civil Code legislation in WB State Assembly.

manifesto.title: Ayushman Bharat Rollout
manifesto.desc: Full statewide implementation of Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY health insurance.

manifesto.title: BSF Border Fencing
manifesto.desc: Transfer land to BSF and complete Bangladesh border fencing.

manifesto.title: Fill All State Dept Vacancies
manifesto.desc: Transparent recruitment to fill 2 lakh+ vacant posts across departments.

manifesto.title: CBI Investigation — TMC Corruption
manifesto.desc: Refer all pending TMC-era corruption cases to CBI.

manifesto.title: Ghatal Master Plan
manifesto.desc: Execute the Ghatal Master Plan for permanent flood control.

manifesto.title: Singur Industrial Park
manifesto.desc: Restore Singur land as a modern industrial park.

manifesto.title: Youth Grant — ₹2,000/month
manifesto.desc: Monthly ₹2,000 stipend for unemployed educated youth.

manifesto.title: BNS Criminal Code
manifesto.desc: Implement BNS, BNSS, BSA criminal codes statewide.

manifesto.title: White Paper Audit
manifesto.desc: Publish White Paper on 15 years of TMC misgovernance.

manifesto.title: SIT for SSC Scam
manifesto.desc: Constitute SIT to probe SSC/TET recruitment scam.

manifesto.title: PM Vishwakarma Yojana
manifesto.desc: Implement PM Vishwakarma for artisans with credit & skill training.

events.title: Counting Begins Across West Bengal
events.desc: EVM counting begins at 294 constituency centres across the state.

events.title: BJP Crosses Majority Mark
events.desc: BJP crosses the 148-seat majority mark in trends. Celebrations erupt across Bengal.

events.title: TMC Concedes Defeat
events.desc: Trinamool Congress accepts defeat after 15 years in power. Mamata Banerjee congratulates BJP.

events.title: Suvendu Adhikari Named CM Candidate
events.desc: BJP Parliamentary Board names Suvendu Adhikari as the Chief Minister of West Bengal.

events.title: Celebrations Across Bengal
events.desc: Victory rallies in all 23 districts. Workers distribute sweets and burst firecrackers.

events.title: PM Modi Congratulates Bengal
events.desc: PM Modi addresses the nation, calls it 'a new dawn for Sonar Bangla'.

events.title: Suvendu Meets Governor at Raj Bhavan
events.desc: CM-designate Suvendu Adhikari meets Governor R.N. Ravi to stake claim to form government.

events.title: Cabinet Formation Discussions
events.desc: BJP central leadership meets to finalize the Council of Ministers.

events.title: Kolkata Police Clamps Down on Rallies with Earthmovers
events.desc: Police restrictions on procession routes were issued after post-poll clashes, with officers warning against carrying heavy machinery into public gatherings.

events.title: 42-Member Ministry List Released
events.desc: Final list of Council of Ministers released. Key portfolios: Home, Finance, Health, Education, Industry.

events.title: 400+ Arrested, 200 FIRs Filed in Post-Poll Violence
events.desc: Police say arrests and FIRs have climbed as violence erupts across West Bengal, with monitoring tightened across sensitive pockets.

events.title: Police Deployment Increased After Aide's Killing
events.desc: Security was stepped up after the killing of a Suvendu Adhikari aide, with additional forces moved into sensitive areas.

events.title: Oath Ceremony Date Announced
events.desc: Governor announces swearing-in ceremony for May 9 at Brigade Parade Ground, Kolkata.

events.title: Brigade Parade Ground Preparations
events.desc: Massive stage setup at Brigade Parade Ground. 2.5 lakh chairs arranged. LED screens installed across Kolkata.

events.title: PM Modi Arrives in Kolkata
events.desc: Prime Minister lands at NSC Bose International Airport. Received by Suvendu Adhikari.

events.title: CM Suvendu Adhikari Sworn In
events.desc: Suvendu Adhikari takes oath as the Chief Minister of West Bengal at Brigade Parade Ground, Kolkata. PM Modi, NDA leaders, and over 2 lakh supporters attend the historic ceremony.

events.title: Council of Ministers Takes Oath
events.desc: Full 42-member council of ministers sworn in, including key portfolios: Home, Finance, Health, Education, and Industry.

events.title: CM's First Address to the State
events.desc: CM Adhikari pledges to fulfill all Sankalp Patra promises. Announces 'Mission 365 Days'.

events.title: CM Visits Nabanna Secretariat
events.desc: CM Adhikari arrives at Nabanna (State Secretariat) for the first time. Reviews pending files and administrative backlog.

events.title: Meeting with Chief Secretary & DGP
events.desc: High-priority meeting with the Chief Secretary and DGP to assess law & order situation and pending administrative matters.

events.title: Administrative Reshuffle Begins
events.desc: Key IAS/IPS transfers initiated. New DGP and Home Secretary appointed.

events.title: First Cabinet Meeting at Nabanna
events.desc: CM Adhikari chairs the historic first Cabinet meeting. Multiple landmark decisions taken on Day 1 itself.

events.title: BSF Border Fencing — Land Transfer Approved
events.desc: Cabinet approves transfer of land to BSF for construction of fencing along the Bangladesh border. 45-day target set for completion.

events.title: Ayushman Bharat Adopted in West Bengal
events.desc: State formally adopts the Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY health insurance scheme, previously blocked by the TMC government for over 5 years.

events.title: PM Vishwakarma & Ujjwala 3.0 Greenlit
events.desc: Cabinet approves immediate implementation of PM Vishwakarma Yojana for artisans and PM Shri Ujjwala Yojana 3.0 for free LPG connections.

events.title: Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita Implemented
events.desc: BNS, BNSS, and BSA criminal law codes officially implemented statewide, replacing the holdover IPC/CrPC regime.

events.title: Job Age Limit Extended by 5 Years
events.desc: Upper age limit for state government job applicants extended by 5 years — providing relief to lakhs of aspirants affected by SSC delays.

events.title: State Census Exercise Initiated
events.desc: Cabinet approves immediate commencement of the Census exercise in West Bengal, pending since 2021.

events.title: Writers' Buildings Restoration Announced
events.desc: Government announces plan to shift the state secretariat back to the historic Writers' Buildings in central Kolkata.

events.title: Existing Welfare Schemes to Continue
events.desc: CM Adhikari assures that no existing social welfare schemes will be discontinued. All beneficiaries will continue to receive benefits.

events.title: Cabinet Portfolios Finalised
events.desc: West Bengal allocates departments to the five sworn-in ministers, with Panchayat, Food, BC Welfare, North Bengal Development and Women & Child Welfare among the key portfolios.

events.title: No Deputy CM; Home & Finance Retained
events.desc: The government decides against appointing a Deputy Chief Minister for now, with Home and Finance staying with the Chief Minister.

events.title: BSF Land Transfer Process Begins
events.desc: The state begins the process to transfer land to the BSF for border fencing along the Bangladesh frontier, with a 45-day completion target.

events.title: CBI Takes Over Probe Into Suvendu Aide Murder
events.desc: The Central Bureau of Investigation takes over the probe after SIT arrests three suspects in the murder case.

events.title: Will ensure safe return of people who fled their homes, says Suvendu
events.desc: CM rejects allegations of post-poll violence; Opposition leader says several people have been forced to flee their homes as fear is prevailing in the State

events.title: Rathindra Bose, a Chartered Accountant and BJP north Bengal MLA, elected Speaker
events.desc: This is the first time that a leader from north Bengal has been selected for the Speaker’s post; Mr. Bose is the MLA from the Cooch Behar Dakshin Assembly seat, where he defeated Trinamool Congress’s Avijit De Bhaumik

events.title: Bengal CM Suvendu Adhikari resigns from Nandigram seat, retains Bhabanipur
events.desc: n Bhabanipur, he beat TMC supremo Mamata Banerjee by a margin of 15,105 votes

events.title: Athlete Swapna Barman becomes victim of poll violence, house attacked
events.desc: Trinamool Congress sent fact-finding teams to different districts of the State to ascertain the extent of post-poll violence

events.title: Bengal Government orders re-verification of caste certificates issued since 2011
events.desc: About 1.69 crore SC, ST and OBC certificates have been issued in the State since 2011; a letter issued by the Backward Classes Welfare Department to all District Magistrates on May 14 says about 47.8 lakh certificates, which include 32.51 lakh SC cer

events.title: FIR filed against TMC's Abhishek over 'inflammatory' remarks during Bengal polls
events.desc: Social activist Rajib Sarkar raised a complaint alleging that the TMC MP Abhishek Banerjee made provocative comments on post-poll violence and the vote counting process

events.title: Adhikari aide killing: CBI conducts searches at multiple locations
events.desc: The search operation was conducted late at night on May 15 and continued till the early hours of May 16

events.title: Mamata asks Trinamool Congress poll candidates to rebuild party; says dissenters
events.desc: At a meeting with the Trinamool Congress' contesting candidates, she said the organisation would rise again despite suffering a crushing defeat in the recently concluded Assembly elections

events.title: Clashes erupt in West Bengal over prayer restrictions
events.desc: Congress leader Adhir Ranjan Chowdhury has sought the Chief Minister’s intervention to mitigate the tensions triggered by the government’s recent guidelines on animal slaughter

events.title: Trinamool leaders face arrests, public anger, return extorted money
events.desc: The crackdown intensified after Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari urged people to file complaints against those who had allegedly extorted money from them during the previous Trinamool Congress regime

events.title: EPICs found strewn in Birbhum field; Aadhaar cards recovered from Trinamool offi
events.desc: BJP leaders alleges that the Trinamool’s party office had long been used for illegal activities and that residents' identity documents had been kept there for questionable purposes

events.title: West Bengal committed to handover land to BSF within 45 days for border fencing:
events.desc: West Bengal minister Ashok Kirtania said land acquisition in most parts of the North 24 Parganas district was progressing satisfactorily, but flagged resistance in the Basirhat area

events.title: Major anti-encroachment drive conducted to clear out Howrah station area in Beng
events.desc: Many temporary stalls and structures occupying footpaths and public spaces near the bus stand and Ganga ghat area were removed using bulldozers and earthmovers as part of a railway land clearance initiative for passengers' convenience

events.title: Bengal govt. gives nod for handover of seven national highway stretches to NHAI,
events.desc: These stretches were under the national highway wing of the State PWD, and the handover proposals had been pending for nearly a year despite repeated requests, the statement said

events.title: Suvendu targets Abhishek, says all his properties will be accounted for
events.desc: West Bengal Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari held his first public meeting after winning elections at Falta, which falls under the Diamond Harbour Lok Sabha seat held by Abhishek Banerjee; Re-polling in the Falta assembly seat will be held on May 21

events.title: TMC sends fact-finding teams across Bengal, alleges attacks and killings after p
events.desc: Party claims over 3,000 workers were attacked and at least 10 killed in post-poll violence; BJP dismisses exercise as “drama” while Calcutta High Court orders safe return of victims

events.title: Discontinuation of Religion-Based Aid
events.desc: The cabinet decides to discontinue government financial assistance programs based on religious categorization starting June 2026 (including imams, muezzins, and purohits).

events.title: Calcutta HC grants protection to TMC’s Falta candidate Jahangir Khan from coerci
events.desc: The court directed that no coercive steps will be taken against Mr. Khan in connection with the pending criminal prosecutions till May 26.

events.title: Jute industry seeks new West Bengal government’s intervention to tide over raw m
events.desc: At least 14 mills across the Hooghly industrial belt have either suspended operations or are facing severe production disruptions, according to IJMA sources

events.title: TMC MLA's son held with firearms in Bengal
events.desc: “Arghya Mondal and the others were found to be in possession of firearms. Two pistols and six mobile phones were seized during the operation,” says the officer

events.title: Watch: Vande Mataram will be sung in every school in West Bengal, says Dilip Gho
events.desc: Watch: Vande Mataram will be sung in every school in West Bengal, says Dilip Ghosh

events.title: Suvendu Adhikari holds first 'janata darbar' after becoming CM
events.desc: Several people, including students, participated in the interactions with the CM at the BJP office in Salt Lake area in Kolkata

events.title: Bengal does not believe in bulldozer politics, says Mamata Banerjee
events.desc: Mamata Banerjee’s remark comes amid eviction drives at various places in the State

events.title: Trinamool Congress candidate for Falta Assembly seat Jahangir Khan withdraws fro
events.desc: Party condemns move, states decision to withdraw from the Falta re-poll is Jahangir Khan’s personal choice and not that of the party.

events.title: Adhikari aide murder case: CBI arrests another accused from U.P.’s Muzaffarnagar
events.desc: He was arrested from U.P.’s Muzaffarnagar; to be produced in a Kolkata court

events.title: Messi tour organiser files complaint against former West Bengal Minister, former
events.desc: The tour organiser Satadru Dutta lodged complaint at the Bidhannagar South Police Station on May 18, 2026

events.title: What is Chicken’s Neck Corridor? India’s biggest military chokepoint
events.desc: The strategic corridor, called the ‘Chicken’s Neck’ for its shape, is a strip of land located in northern West Bengal’s Siliguri area.

events.title: West Bengal govt to roll out Annapurna Bhandar, discontinue schemes based on rel
events.desc: The approval of Annapurna Bhandar came in the second Cabinet meeting of the BJP government, nine days after the Chief Minister and five other ministers took oath

events.title: No religious sloganeering, pelting of stones will be allowed, Suvendu warns prot
events.desc: ‘I am giving a clear message that there will be zero tolerance towards this kind of unrest, hooliganism and anti-national, anti-social activities,’ the newly elected West Bengal Chief Minister says

events.title: West Bengal Police reopens 59 cases linked to 2021 post-poll violence, registers
events.desc: Multiple Trinamool leaders come under the police crackdown as many face arrests in corruption and post-poll violence charges

events.title: Detect, Delete & Deport — Mechanism Active
events.desc: CM Adhikari confirms the 'Detect, Delete & Deport' framework for illegal infiltrators came into effect. Police and RPF directed to hand over infiltrators (not covered under CAA) directly to BSF for deportation. CMO to receive weekly reports.

events.title: Suspense continues over West Bengal Cabinet expansion
events.desc: There are 54 departments in the West Bengal government and Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari holds charge of 42 of them, including Home, Finance, Industries, School, Higher Education and Health.

events.title: BJP govt. in State will be of nationalists, says CM Suvendu during maiden visit
events.desc: BJP government will work towards giving north Bengal its developmental dues to erase the deprivation meted out to the region earlier, says Suvendu Adhikari during his maiden visit to the region

events.title: Kolkata swelters as Meteorological department forecasts heavy rain in North Beng
events.desc: Heavy downpour is likely over the sub-Himalayan districts of Darjeeling, Kalimpong, Jalpaiguri, Alipurduar and Cooch Behar from May 21 to 25

events.title: EC doubles security arrangements for Falta repoll in West Bengal
events.desc: According to an official at the state Chief Electoral Officer, eight Central Armed Police Force (CAPF) personnel, equivalent to one full section, will be deployed at each polling booth

events.title: Trouble mounts for Abhishek Banerjee as Kolkata civic body sends notice against
events.desc: In the last few days, Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari has been talking about properties owned by the Trinamool Congress general secretary and other Trinamool leaders that are under scrutiny

events.title: Shyam Metalics announces ₹20,000 crore investment push in Bengal
events.desc: Company plans railway manufacturing unit in Kharagpur, expansion of workforce to 45,000; seeks easier land policy and faster industrial growth under new government

events.title: Revised OBC List of 66 Classes Notified
events.desc: The state government formally notifies a revised list of 66 OBC classes for reservation in state services, aligning with the Calcutta High Court directive.

events.title: Media Interaction Restrictions Issued
events.desc: Administration issues a strict directive prohibiting government employees and officials from interacting with media outlets without prior approval.

events.desc: The court, however, makes oral observations that the TMC leader’s remarks were uncalled for

events.title: Row over Vande Mataram being made mandatory in West Bengal’s madrasas

events.title: Calcutta High Court asks Bengal government to decide on exemption in animal slau
events.desc: A division Bench presided by Chief Justice Sujoy Paul directed that the State shall take a decision in this regard within 24 hours from the date of communication of this order

events.title: 88% voter turnout as Bengal’s Falta repoll remains peaceful

events.title: West Bengal government issues orders prohibiting officials to speak to media

events.title: West Bengal government to detect, delete and deport illegal infiltrators, says C

events.title: Trinamool MLAs hold protest in West Bengal Assembly over hawker eviction and tor
events.desc: Senior leaders like Firhad Hakim, Kunal Ghosh, Ritabrata Banerjee, and Nayana Bandyopadhyay were seen leading the sit-in demonstration inside the Assembly compound on May 20

events.title: 'Detect, Delete & Deport' — CAA-Exempt Deportations Confirmed
events.desc: CM Adhikari reaffirms that infiltrators not covered under CAA will be directly handed to BSF without producing before courts. CMO to receive weekly oversight reports on BSF-BGB handovers.

events.title: Agnimitra Paul Defends Urban Demolition Drive
events.desc: Urban Development Minister Agnimitra Paul defends zero-tolerance policy on illegal structures. Notices served to building owners; demolitions proceed on failure to present valid legal documents. Drives linked to Tiljala fire safety concerns.

events.title: TMC Portraits Replaced in Government Offices
events.desc: BJP workers replace portraits of former CM Mamata Banerjee with those of President Droupadi Murmu, PM Modi, and CM Suvendu Adhikari in government offices including Asansol Municipal Corporation.

events.title: Bengal SIR: Tribunals dispose of over 6,500 appeals so far, allow 61.5% cases ba
events.desc: . The status of over 1,200 remaining cases among the disposed matters was not immediately clear from the data

events.title: Decoding SIR impact in West Bengal

events.title: TMC alleges Leader of Opposition not allotted room in Bengal Assembly
events.desc: LoP Sobhandeb Chattopadhyay warned that the party MLAs would hold a dharna over the alleged delay in the allotment

events.title: West Bengal government notifies free bus travel for women in State-run buses fro
events.desc: The Transport Department notification says that a smart card with QR code, photograph, and beneficiary details will be issued to all eligible women upon application

events.title: ED raids in case against Sona Pappu, ex-Kolkata Police Deputy Commissioner
events.desc: The premises include those of Mohammad Ali alias Max Raju, Saurav Adhikari, nephew of Biswas, and a "close associate" of Biswas named Ruhil Amin Ali, who is a Kolkata Police Sub Inspector, and Biswas' house in Murshidabad.

events.title: Ranchi bizman held for alleged cheating, rape of Chhattisgarh BJP leader: Cops
events.desc: An FIR was registered against Sanjay Singh at on May 14 on charges of rape, extortion and cheating, among others, following a complaint lodged by the woman BJP leader

events.title: BJP’s Prasad Lad meets Manoj Jarange Patil in govt’s outreach to quota activist
events.desc: The ruling alliance in Maharashtra wants to persuade the Maratha quota activist to at least defer the protest, if not call it off entirely

events.title: One more Trinamool councillor from Bidhannagar arrested
events.desc: Charges against the arrested TMC leaders include extortion, intimidation, and money laundering; the TMC’s top leadership remains largely silent on the arrests

events.title: Ayushman Bharat scheme to roll out in West Bengal from July 1: CM Suvendu Adhika
events.desc: Work on enrollment into scheme has already started; plan afoot to rope in all six crore beneficiaries of previous Trinamool government’s Swastha Saathi health scheme

events.title: West Bengal gained infamy due to recruitment scams, new policy in next Budget se

events.title: CPI(M) says TMC melting down faster than ice; hopes to take over Opposition spac
events.desc: The CPI(M) leader Mohammed Salim said the party will fight for the safety of the minorities and any impending danger to the culture of West Bengal and amity among the people

events.desc: Without directly naming Bikash Ranjan Bhattacharya, Kalyan Banerjee, who is himself a senior advocate, raised questions on the CPI(M) leader for defending his own party’s former MLA and her husband both of whom “face serious allegations of corruption

events.title: Bengal CM on first visit to Delhi after taking charge, meets President, Prime Mi
events.desc: The West Bengal Chief Minister posted on social media that the Prime Minister Narendra Modi re-emphasized his vision of Sabka Saath, Sabka Vikas and reiterated that the development of West Bengal remains a top priority for the Central Government.

events.title: BJP's Bengal win can reshape India's economic direction: Pradeep Gupta
events.desc: Pradeep Gupta pointed out that regions with a strong port infrastructure and trade networks historically became centres of prosperity

events.title: Bengali actors face heat after power shift to BJP; FIR filed over 2021 social me

events.title: On Trinamool Turncoats In Bengal, BJP Between A Rock And A Hard Place
events.desc: The BJP's state unit has bluntly declined to give way to prospective Trinamool turncoats, arguing the party isn't a dharmshala.

events.title: Raghav Chadha Appointed Chairman Of Rajya Sabha Committee On Petitions
events.desc: Rajya Sabha MP Raghav Chadha who switched from the AAP to the BJP recently has been appointed as the new chairman of the Committee on Petitions of the Upper House.

events.title: RG Kar Case: Bengal Starts Departmental Proceedings Against Suspended Doctor
events.desc: The West Bengal government on Saturday initiated departmental proceedings against a doctor suspended following the rape and murder at RG Kar Medical College and Hospital, and also ordered a separate enquiry into his admission to a postgraduate course

events.title: India, US to continue working together for global good: PM Modi to US secy Rubio
events.desc: Rubio flew into Kolkata early on Saturday to begin a four-day visit to India, during which he will hold talks with his counterpart S Jaishankar on Sunday

events.desc: Panda won with over 1 lakh votes. The TMC candidate had backed out of the contest before the polls.

events.title: Tamil Nadu: BJP demands stern action against perpetrators of sexual assault case
events.desc: In Tamil Nadu, ministers demand swift action against those responsible for the sexual assault and murder of a 10-year-old girl in Coimbatore.

events.title: Congress-DMK rift widens as leaders trade charges
events.desc: Congress lawmaker Manickam Tagore alleged that the BJP acted as a mediator between the AIADMK and DMK to stop TVK chief C Joseph Vijay from becoming the chief minister following TVK’s sweeping victory in the Tamil Nadu assembly elections.

events.title: IMD forecasts rain for south Bengal from Wednesday
events.desc: The India Meteorological Department said there will be a gradual fall in maximum temperature across West Bengal from May 28 by two to three notches

events.desc: West Bengal Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari recently held his second 'janata darbar', listening to public demands at the BJP's state office in Salt Lake.

events.title: Teen Killed In Madurai Temple Parking Lot, BJP Attacks Chief Minister Vijay
events.desc: The incident comes barely days after a 10-year-old girl was allegedly kidnapped, sexually assaulted and brutally murdered near Sulur in Coimbatore district.

events.title: Mamata Banerjee, after Bengal loss, extends support to Cockroach Janta Party
events.desc: The Cockroach Janta Party, founded by Boston-based Abhijeet Dipke, gained traction on social media after its launch last week.

events.desc: Kishor is bullish on Bankipur, and claimed that only the Jan Suraaj Party can defeat the BJP there. "We just need to field a strong candidate," he said.

events.title: ‘Detect, delete and deport’: Suvendu's Trump-like model for ‘illegal immigrants’

events.desc: Drives against illegal construction, notices to properties linked to senior Trinamool leaders, and mass resignations in local bodies pile pressure on the TMC three weeks after the BJP assumed power in West Bengal

events.title: Setback for BJD as MP quits party, resigns from RS
events.desc: BJD lawmaker Debashish Samantaray resigned from the party and Rajya Sabha, citing being belittled, and plans to join BJP, marking a setback for BJD.

events.desc: TMC MP Kakoli Ghosh Dastidar resigned as Barasat district president, citing moral responsibility for election losses and criticizing authoritarian leadership.

events.title: No traction for cockroach party : Haryana CM
events.desc: Haryana CM Nayab Singh Saini dismissed the Cockroach Janata Party as short-lived, asserting BJP's strong support in Punjab ahead of elections.

events.desc: In a statement, an IndiGo spokesperson said all passengers and crew members were safe and had been shifted back to the terminal.

events.desc: CM Suvendu Adhikari stated that the West Bengal government would also set up an AYUSH department, delinking it from the state health department.

events.desc: The complaint alleges that Mamata Banerjee's comments hurt the sentiments of followers of Sanatan Dharma and promoted communal disharmony.

events.desc: Chief minister Suvendu Adhikari said those found to be Bangladeshi nationals should leave the country voluntarily.

events.title: Traveller from Uganda isolated over Ebola symptoms in Bengaluru tests negative

events.desc: Karnataka power tussle Live: The party said discussions were on the upcoming Rajya Sabha elections and polls in the Karnataka legislative council. Siddaramaiah, too, denied reports that discussions had taken place on changing the CM.

moments.title: CM Adhikari's Firm Warning to Infiltrators
moments.desc: West Bengal CM Suvendu Adhikari issued a strong warning to alleged illegal Bangladeshi infiltrators, instructing them to leave or face strict government action.

moments.title: Holding Centers Opened for Illegal Infiltrators
moments.desc: CM Suvendu Adhikari announced the opening of new holding centers in West Bengal, targeting alleged illegal Bangladeshi infiltrators as part of the new government policy.

moments.title: Deportation of Illegal Immigrants Begins
moments.desc: The West Bengal government has commenced its strict policy to detect, detain, and deport illegal immigrants, with actions reported at border checkposts.

moments.title: CM Adhikari: 'Rule of Law Will Prevail'
moments.desc: West Bengal CM Suvendu Adhikari stated that the rule of law, not the ruler's law, will prevail in the state, addressing concerns potentially related to liquor shops or general governance.

moments.title: Bengal Implements CAA: Deportation Orders via BSF
moments.desc: The West Bengal government announced a major policy shift, implementing the Citizenship Amendment Act and ordering the arrest and deportation of illegal immigrants via BSF.

moments.title: BJP Govt Launches ₹5 Fish Curry Meal Canteens
moments.desc: The BJP Government in Bengal is set to launch 400 canteens across the state, serving nutritious fish curry meals for just ₹5 as part of a new welfare scheme.

moments.title: Vande Mataram Compulsory in Madarsas Order Issued
moments.desc: The West Bengal government has issued a significant order making the singing of Vande Mataram compulsory in all Madarsas across the state.

moments.title: CM Adhikari Holds Kalyani Administrative Meeting
moments.desc: West Bengal CM Suvendu Adhikari held an important administrative meeting in Kalyani, reviewing key governance issues and departmental progress.

moments.title: CM Demands Illegal Immigrant Removal
moments.desc: West Bengal CM Suvendu Adhikari called for the immediate identification and removal of illegal immigrants from the state.

moments.title: CM's Big Action On Border Security
moments.desc: CM Suvendu Adhikari announced readiness to hand over a portion of land for enhancing Border Security.

moments.title: CM Attends Administrative Meeting
moments.desc: Bengal CM Suvendu Adhikari received a Guard of Honour upon arrival to attend an Administrative meeting.

moments.title: CM Visits Delhi's Bangla Bhavan
moments.desc: West Bengal CM Suvendu Adhikari arrived at Delhi's Bangla Bhavan, where he received a grand welcome.

moments.title: TMC Leaders पर Crackdown
moments.desc: The new Bengal government has launched a massive crackdown on Trinamool Congress leaders, including parading a gang leader in underclothes, bulldozing offices, and downgrading security.

moments.title: Illegal Immigration पर 'Detect, Delete & Deport' Policy
moments.desc: West Bengal government introduces the 'Detect, Delete & Deport' policy, establishing centres and beginning a drive against illegal immigration in the state.

moments.title: Nandigram में CM का Law & Order पर बयान
moments.desc: CM Suvendu Adhikari addresses the situation in Nandigram, urging citizens not to take the law into their own hands and assures accountability.

moments.title: North Bengal Development Roadmap Unveiled
moments.desc: CM Suvendu Adhikari unveils a comprehensive roadmap for the development of North Bengal, acknowledging the region's consistent support for the BJP.

moments.title: Bakrid से पहले Bulldozer Action
moments.desc: CM Suvendu Adhikari orders bulldozer action in Bengal ahead of Bakrid, targeting illegal encroachments.

moments.title: OMR Copy 'Ghar Le Jao' Announcement
moments.desc: CM Suvendu Adhikari announces that examinees can now take OMR copies home, a significant step towards greater transparency.

moments.title: Bengal BJP President's Chamber Address
moments.desc: Bengal BJP President Samik Bhattacharya addresses the Bharat Chamber of Commerce live in Kolkata, discussing economic and political matters.

moments.title: Border Security: CM Hands Land to BSF
moments.desc: CM Suvendu Adhikari hands over land to the BSF for enhanced border fencing, emphasizing strict action against illegal foreigner transit.

moments.title: CM Adhikari Inspects Nandigram Booths
moments.desc: CM Suvendu Adhikari inspected booths in Nandigram, stating, "I have seen all the booths."

moments.title: CM Adhikari Takes Action on Humayun Kabir
moments.desc: CM Suvendu Adhikari initiated major action concerning Humayun Kabir, alongside discussions around Bakrid.

moments.title: WB Govt Enforces Animal Protection Act
moments.desc: The new BJP government, led by CM Suvendu Adhikari, has commenced strict enforcement of the West Bengal Animal Protection Act.

moments.title: WB Orders Holding Centres for Rohingyas
moments.desc: The West Bengal government has ordered the creation of "holding centres" for the detention and deportation of illegal Rohingya immigrants.

moments.title: WB Govt Scraps Welfare for Imams & Purohits
moments.desc: The West Bengal government has implemented a significant policy shift by scrapping welfare benefits previously provided to Imams and Purohits.

moments.title: Bulldozer Action: Illegal TMC Office Demolished
moments.desc: An office belonging to a Trinamool Congress councillor, allegedly built illegally on government land, was demolished using a bulldozer in West Bengal.

moments.title: CM Suvendu Holds Janta Darbar, Hears Grievances
moments.desc: West Bengal CM Suvendu Adhikari held a 'Janta Darbar' at the BJP office, actively listening to and addressing public grievances.

moments.title: WB Govt Revises Eid-ul-Adha Holiday Schedule
moments.desc: The West Bengal government has issued a new notification revising the Eid-ul-Adha holiday schedule, which has sparked public discussion.

moments.title: CM Adhikari Meets PM Modi in First Official Visit
moments.desc: West Bengal Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari met Prime Minister Narendra Modi during his first official Delhi visit after taking office.

moments.title: West Bengal CM Meets Defence Minister Rajnath Singh
moments.desc: West Bengal CM Suvendu Adhikari met Defence Minister Rajnath Singh in Delhi as part of his official visits.

moments.title: CM Orders Deportation of Post-2024 Non-Hindu Refugees
moments.desc: CM Suvendu Adhikari issued a directive to deport non-Hindu refugees who entered West Bengal after 2024 due to religious persecution.

moments.title: West Bengal Govt Notifies Fresh OBC List
moments.desc: The West Bengal government has notified a fresh revision of the OBC (Other Backward Classes) list, marking a significant shift in reservation policy.

moments.title: BJP's Big Win in Falta
moments.desc: The BJP secured a significant victory in Falta, challenging the so-called 'Diamond Harbour Model' in West Bengal politics.

moments.title: CM Suvendu Adhikari Meets PM Modi in Delhi
moments.desc: West Bengal CM Suvendu Adhikari on his first official visit to Delhi met Prime Minister Modi.

moments.title: WB Updates Animal Regulation for Eid-ul-Adha
moments.desc: The West Bengal Government has issued new guidelines for animal regulation ahead of Eid-ul-Adha, sparking public discussion.

moments.title: Vande Mataram Mandatory in WB Schools
moments.desc: The West Bengal government has made the recitation of Vande Mataram compulsory in schools and madrasas, leading to a political discussion.

moments.title: CM Suvendu Adhikari In Nandigram
moments.desc: Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari reaffirmed his commitment to Nandigram, stating he will be available to the constituency as before, during a recent visit.

moments.title: Falta By-Election Counting Underway
moments.desc: Vote counting for the Falta by-election is currently underway in South 24 Parganas, with heavy security deployed outside the strong room at Diamond Harbour Women's University.

moments.title: Eid Holiday Revised To One Day
moments.desc: The West Bengal government has announced a revised public holiday schedule for Bakri Eid on May 28, declaring a one-day holiday instead of the previously decided two days.

moments.title: CM Suvendu Adhikari's Press Conference
moments.desc: Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari addressed a press conference live from Nabanna, updating the public on key governance news and the state's development agenda.

moments.title: Falta Repolling: BJP Wins Key Fortress!
moments.desc: The BJP camp celebrates a massive lead in the West Bengal Falta repolling, signaling a loss for TMC in what was considered another stronghold.

moments.title: Deportation Holding Centres Ordered
moments.desc: The West Bengal government has issued orders for establishing holding centres, indicating a significant step in its recently outlined deportation policy.

moments.title: CM Adhikari: 'Open Employment Doors!'
moments.desc: CM Suvendu Adhikari, speaking in Nandigram, emphasized the critical need to open doors for employment, signaling a strong focus on job creation.

moments.title: Bakri Eid Holiday Cut To One Day
moments.desc: The West Bengal BJP government has reduced the Bakri Eid public holiday for government employees from two days to one, intensifying a political debate.

moments.title: BJP Wins Falta Assembly Seat
moments.desc: Celebrations erupted as BJP's Debangshu Panda secured a victory in the Falta Assembly by-election, marking a significant win for the party in West Bengal.

moments.title: Holding Centers for Illegal Migrants to be Set Up
moments.desc: The West Bengal government announced a significant decision to establish holding centers for illegal immigrants in the state, preparing for their eventual deportation.

moments.title: Bengal Ends Red Road Eid Namaz
moments.desc: The West Bengal government officially ended the long-standing tradition of holding large Eid namaz gatherings on Kolkata's iconic Red Road, a move that is expected to spark public debate.

moments.title: CM Announces Affordable Medicine Scheme
moments.desc: CM Suvendu Adhikari announced a new scheme making medicines worth Rs 2000 available for just Rs 200, aiming to significantly reduce healthcare costs for the public.

moments.title: Rs 39,000 Cr Released for Bengal
moments.desc: Following CM Suvendu Adhikari's official visit to Delhi, PM Modi's government has released a massive Rs 39,000 crore for West Bengal.

moments.title: CM Adhikari Completes Two Weeks
moments.desc: West Bengal's first BJP Chief Minister, Suvendu Adhikari, has completed two weeks in office, with his government already implementing significant changes across the state.

moments.title: OBC Reservation System Revised
moments.desc: The Suvendu Adhikari government has announced a major policy change, revising the state's existing OBC reservation structure to ensure fairness.

moments.title: Ban on Street Namaz & Stone Pelting
moments.desc: CM Suvendu Adhikari's government has imposed strict rules banning public Namaz on streets and initiated strong actions against stone pelting incidents for public order.

moments.title: BJP Wins Bengal — Historic Victory
moments.desc: BJP crosses 200+ seats, ending 15 years of TMC rule in West Bengal.

moments.title: Suvendu Adhikari Sworn In as CM
moments.desc: Historic oath ceremony at Brigade Parade Ground with PM Modi present.

moments.title: First Cabinet — 9 Landmark Decisions
moments.desc: Ayushman Bharat, BSF fencing, BNS implementation, Census approved on Day 1.

moments.title: Second Cabinet — Historic Decisions
moments.desc: Cabinet approves ₹3,000/month Annapurna scheme, 7th Pay Commission, and free bus rides for women.

moments.title: PM Modi's 'Sonar Bangla' Address
moments.desc: PM congratulates Bengal, calls it 'a new dawn for Sonar Bangla'.

moments.title: Ayushman Bharat — Finally in Bengal!
moments.desc: State adopts PM-JAY after 5 years of TMC blockade.

moments.title: Writers' Building Restoration Announced
moments.desc: Historic secretariat to be restored and reoccupied by new government.
